case_title: IGOR KRYAN et al VS. RAMA MODY GOVIL et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-07-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-07-2011 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS AND DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT GOVIL, RAMA MODY GOVIL, JAY MAILED TO RESPONDENT KRYAN, IGOR KRYAN, LUDMILA
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAR-03-2011 - CONTINUED TO APR-07-2011 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 414 PER STIPULATION AND ORDER.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT KRYAN, IGOR KRYAN, LUDMILA RECOVER FROM APPELLANT GOVIL, RAMA MODY GOVIL, JAY $2,680.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,730.00, REPRESENTS $1600.00 FOR PROPERTY DAMAGE AND 50% OF DAMAGE TO MERCHANDISE AND PERSONAL INJURY ($1300.00 AND $1059.00 RESPECTIVELY). NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-12-2010 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO DEC-03-2010 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS ONLY. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-07-2011 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 414
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,950.00 FILED BY KRYAN, IGOR KRYAN, LUDMILA AS TO DEFENDANT GOVIL, RAMA MODY GOVIL, JAY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-12-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF APR-07-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-07-2011 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ELLIOTT MYLES
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $20.00) SERVED OCT-23-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GOVIL, JAY
CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO THE PLAINTIFF LUDMILA KRYAN, RETURNED "NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED/UNABLE TO FORWARD".
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUBPOENA AS TO JASON MOSTASISA, OFFICER #1918; COURT COPY OF SUBPOENA NOT ATTACHED ($30 SERVICE FEE) FILED BY DEFENDANT GOVIL, RAMA MODY GOVIL, JAY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-07-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KRYAN, IGOR KRYAN, LUDMILA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOVIL, RAMA MODY GOVIL, JAY $3,898.50 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,988.50, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS DAMAGES AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF IGOR KRYAN IN THE SUM OF $2870.00 FOR THE RETURNED CHECK AND SERVICE CHARGE; AND $1028.50 FOR PLAINTIFF LUDMILA KRYAN'S GENERAL AND SPECIAL DAMAGES INCIDENT TO HER PERSONAL INJURY CLAIM. THE PERSONAL INJURY AWARD HAS BEEN ADJUSTED FOR 50% COMPARITIVE FAULT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-03-2010 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION FOR TRIAL TO JAN-07-2011 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANTS WAIVE SERVICE; ALL PARTIES ORDERED TO APPEAR. APPEARANCE BY ALL NAMED PARTIES. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-11-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:26am
Judge Elliott Myles, clerk Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 414.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellants, appear with and through attorney Timothy O'Donnell. Respondents, Igor & Ludmila Kryan appear in pro per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Myles.

Respondent calls Ala Kaslova as witness
Respondent calls Conchetta Washington as witness
Respondent calls Oleg Kryan as witness
Appellant calls Mohammed Abdulla as witness

EXHR (A) Letter dated 3/5/11 and interrogatory request

10:48am
Evidence is retained, matter is submitted.

Case is continued to 4/7/11 per the agreement of both parties.
